description_long: This modern bungalow features a single-story layout with an open-plan living area seamlessly connected to an expansive outdoor deck. The exterior is characterized by clean white walls, large glass sliding doors, and a flat roof, giving it a contemporary aesthetic. The outdoor space includes a rectangular swimming pool, sun loungers, a shaded pergola, and a palm tree, creating a resort-like atmosphere. The interior appears to be divided into distinct living and sleeping quarters, with visible furnishings such as beds, sofas, and a dining table. The use of large windows and sliding doors maximizes natural light and provides direct access to the outdoor amenities. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living, with a focus on relaxation and leisure.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with white walls, large glass doors, and an expansive outdoor deck featuring a pool, loungers, and a pergola. The design highlights open-plan living and seamless indoor-outdoor flow.
description_view_0: Side view showing the division between the indoor living space and the outdoor deck with pool and palm tree.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, large glass doors, pool, sun loungers, and pergola.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the pool area, and the palm tree on the left.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the solid exterior wall, with a glimpse of the pool and outdoor area beyond.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large sliding glass doors and scattered windows
